channel.title: RVA Figure Drawing
channel.description: Figure drawing sessions in Richmond, VA

item.title: Tue, Jun 16 · 10:30 AM – 12:30 PM — Morning Figure Drawing at Artspace on June 16, 2026
item.description: Location: Artspace, 2833-A Hathaway Rd., Richmond, VA 23225 | Cost: $10 donation | Figure Drawing sessions every third Tuesday of the month. Draw a live model for 2 hours. Open session, all skill levels welcome. Must be over 18. Chairs provided; bring your own drawing materials/board/easel.

item.title: Wed, Jun 24 · 7:45 PM – 10:00 PM — 18+ Figure Drawing: June Session
item.description: Location: Unkindness Art, 2923 North Avenue, Richmond, VA 23222 | Cost: $10.00 | Ongoing nude figure drawing series open to all artists 18 and over. June session is a short pose session featuring a single model — ideal for fast, gestural sketches. Tickets required; no door tickets. 18+ only with valid photo ID required.

item.title: Thu, Jun 25 · 6:00 PM – 8:30 PM — Figure Drawing Open Studio
item.description: Location: Hanover Arts & Activities Center, 500 South Center Street, Ashland, VA 23005 | Cost: $10 | Open figure drawing with a live model in a relaxed, supportive environment. Artists of all levels welcome. Bring your own drawing materials; tables and chairs provided. No registration required.

item.title: Mon, Jul 13 · 10:00 AM – 5:30 PM — The Alchemy Of Expression: Portrait Sculpture Workshop
item.description: Location: Manchester Studios RVA, 1300 West Main Street, Richmond, Virginia 23220 | Cost: $1600 | Two-week portrait sculpture workshop (July 13-17 and July 20-24, 2026). Instructed by Constance Bowden using Classical Realism methods. Covers skull anatomy, muscles, cartilage, fat pads, and portrait from life. Days 4-10 working from a live model. All materials and model fees included. All skill levels welcome. Register via Zelle to ConstanceBowden@yahoo.com.

item.title: Wed, Jul 29 · 7:45 PM – 10:00 PM — Drawn to Life: A Crash Course on Life Drawing
item.description: Location: Unkindness Art, 2923 North Avenue, Richmond, VA 23222 | Cost: $10.00 | All-ages crash course on life drawing covering techniques for drawing from life and the human figure. Includes a presentation, break, and guided figure drawing session with a live clothed model. Hosted by resident tattoo artist Liam Williams. Tickets required; no door tickets.

item.title: Thu, Jul 30 · 6:00 PM – 8:30 PM — Figure Drawing Open Studio
item.description: Location: Hanover Arts & Activities Center, 500 South Center Street, Ashland, VA 23005 | Cost: $10 | Open figure drawing with a live model in a relaxed, supportive environment. Artists of all levels welcome. Bring your own drawing materials; tables and chairs provided. No registration required.

item.title: Thu, Aug 27 · 6:00 PM – 8:30 PM — Figure Drawing Open Studio
item.description: Location: Hanover Arts & Activities Center, 500 South Center Street, Ashland, VA 23005 | Cost: $10 | Open figure drawing with a live model in a relaxed, supportive environment. Artists of all levels welcome. Bring your own drawing materials; tables and chairs provided. No registration required.

item.title: Thu, Sep 24 · 6:00 PM – 8:30 PM — Figure Drawing Open Studio
item.description: Location: Hanover Arts & Activities Center, 500 South Center Street, Ashland, VA 23005 | Cost: $10 | Open figure drawing with a live model in a relaxed, supportive environment. Artists of all levels welcome. Bring your own drawing materials; tables and chairs provided. No registration required.
